description.p1: ITOTO Learning Hub (ILH) is a values-driven learning and capacity development center committed to empowering individuals and institutions through practical, inclusive, and transformational learning.
description.p2: Rooted in community realities and open to global opportunities, ILH connects education, employability, entrepreneurship, and social responsibility in Burundi and beyond.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide high-quality learning, language, and development services that nurture skilled, ethical, and socially responsible individuals.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where individuals and communities thrive through quality, relevant, and inclusive learning.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: We adopt a practical, learner-centered, and partnership-based approach that ensures long-term impact beyond short-term training.

items.i1: Safe, inclusive learning spaces where learners actively apply knowledge
items.i2: Sustained coaching, mentorship, and follow-up for long-term impact

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our programs and services. Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to us directly.
faq.question: Still have questions?
faq.answer: Our team is here to help. Contact us for personalized assistance.

items.question: What languages do you offer training in?
items.answer: We offer comprehensive training in four languages: English, French, Kirundi, and Kiswahili. Each program focuses on the four core skills: speaking, listening, reading, and writing. We also offer specialized courses for diaspora children to learn Kirundi.

items.question: How do I prepare for TOEFL or IELTS with ILH?
items.answer: Our test preparation program includes practice tests, focused skill-building sessions, personalized feedback, and proven strategies for success. We offer both group classes and one-on-one coaching to match your learning style and schedule.

items.question: Do you help with university applications?
items.answer: Yes! Our Academic & Career Support service includes comprehensive university application assistance. We help with program selection, application documentation, personal statements, and navigating the admission process for universities worldwide.

items.question: What professional development courses do you offer?
items.answer: We offer training in personal development, leadership, entrepreneurship, financial literacy, team management, negotiation, conflict resolution, and work ethics. These programs are designed for individuals and can be customized for organizations.

items.question: How does your ECD program support communities?
items.answer: Our Early Childhood Development program provides child-centered learning tools, caregiver education, child protection initiatives, and support for community-led ECD centers. We focus on building strong foundations for lifelong learning.

items.question: Do you offer translation and interpretation services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide professional translation services for documents in English, French, Kirundi, and Kiswahili. We also offer both simultaneous and consecutive interpretation for meetings, conferences, and events.

items.question: Can organizations partner with ILH for training?
items.answer: Absolutely! We work with local and international nonprofits, government institutions, and development partners. We can customize our programs to meet your organization's specific needs and goals.

items.question: What makes ILH different from other learning centers?
items.answer: ILH is values-driven and community-rooted. We focus on holistic, practical, and transformational learning. Our approach includes sustained coaching and mentorship, and we reinvest a portion of our income to support education for the less fortunate.
